nts1.d: All flavours of acoustic & historical nuggets from Andras - Melbourne production wiz, composer & sleuth of musical ephemera…

nts1.n: Jupiter Presents: SILVERSCREEN by Eloghosa Osunde w/ Liv.e

nts1.d: Long time record collector and purveyor of fine musical flavours Mr. Pedro cooks up a banquet of aural delights every other week: afrobeat to disco and more, time to liven up.

nts1.n: ORGANIC MUSIC TOKYO W/ CHEE SHIMIZU
nts1.d: The man behind Tokyo's revered Organic Music record store takes to the airwaves for a monthly 60 minute journey through his extensive collection…

nts1.n: THE EARLY BIRD SHOW W/ SPIRIT BLUE
nts1.d: Dawn moods for the early birds, courtesy of Sleepier & Impey aka Spirit Blue.

nts1.n: THE NTS BREAKFAST SHOW W/ FLO
nts1.d: Breakfast, in Flo motion - served by Flo Dill, every Monday to Thursday.

nts1.n: SOUP TO NUTS W/ SHY ONE
nts1.d: DJ & producer Shy One oversees the chatroom nonsense and brings that necessary get-up-and-go vibe every single hump day…

Radio Jiro is the two hour show of artist Jiro Bevis, every 4 weeks, Monday 2-4pm. The show features a wide variety of sounds from across the globe with previous specials covering themes such as Meditation, Italian, UK punk, Japanese Techno-Pop, Library and French.
Parisian party instigator Louise Chen pulls from a timeless well of classic & modern house, disco, soul, pop, & more.

nts1.n: A LONG STRANGE DREAM W/ BATU
Jupiter Presents: The Saturday Man by Aaliyah Bilal w/ Angel Dat Dawid & D-Composed
Jupiter Presents: they'll talk about us plenty by Tembe Denton-Hurst w/ Ivy Sole
Jupiter Presents: Ballistics by Briana Pickens w/ BSA Gold
THE EARLY BIRD SHOW W/ PAM
THE NTS BREAKFAST SHOW W/ FLO

nts2.n: No Earth Tones w/ Ben Block (R)
nts2.d: Welcome to the Bennett Show - a monthly 2hr broadcast live from the LA studio.

Self proclaimed “Underground and Black”, Detroit native Ash Lauryn leads her musical charge with a candid love for the historical roots of dance music, and the power of reclamation in modern day America.

An ectotherm is an organism reliant on environmental sources of heat to regulate body temperature. Ectotherm is also a Copenhagen-based record label founded by Courtesy and Mama Snake, home to releases from Schacke, Rune Bagge and Ibon.
Rising Dutch producer + DJ Upsammy brings her ear for crystalline melody and intricate rhythm to the NTS airwaves for adventurous and narrative mixes once a month.
The beginning of what will be an extended look into the works of Valentin Silvestrov, here showcasing both his pianistic and orchestral styles in two large-scale pieces.
"Raga Vibrations" is a monthly selection of Indian music curated by Greg Davis.
Curio earworms and other obsessions from Krakow's Natalia Panzer.

nts2.n: Tara Clerkin Trio w/ more eaze
nts2.d: Off-centre rhythms, muted electronics & slick modern compositions in a monthly missive from the Bristolian psych-rock jammers…
Bimonthly radio hour taking you down various musical rabbit holes.

High Jazz* is an independent record label specializing in 70s & 80s soul, jazz & funk. ill Dubio takes the reigns for the monthly High Jazz* show rustling up an hour of choice selections on a Wednesday.
From the host: "Harvest for the World"

All-genre NTS monthly by New York–based, New Delhi–born Arushi Jain fka modularprincess
From the host: "I recorded this DJ set live at Nowadays in NYC for the celebration of Nowruz, the ancient Persian New Year. I explored Persian classical strings, devotional voices (Hossein Alizadeh, Mahsa Vahdat, Hossein Omoumi), Armenian duduk, Indian raga, and Egyptian song with club-adjacent texture & bass."

nts2.n: Amarillo on Everything w/ Hayden Pedigo
SÉANCE CENTRE w/ Fantasy in Orbit
No ID Radio: 100% Unreleased w/ Anysia Kym
La Cosecha Internacional: La Sonora Malandrina En Vivo Parte 2
Rambo Radio w/ DJ B.Cause & Mista B
The Uline Catalog w/ Calvin LeCompte (R)

subtle.d: Hailing from northern Italy, STANDARD is a collective of artists, DJs and producers that aims at the promotion of bass music: Garage, UK Funky, Breaks, Leftfield Bass, Leftfield Techno, Dubstep, everything in between and beyond. They focus on the Italian Bass scene, showcasing new up-and-coming artists as well as established talents from all over the peninsula.

Oddkut is a producer & DJ hailing from Balakovo City, Russia. He's part of the Russian collective "United Gang" who are a Moscow-based community of local musicians, DJ's and promoters teamed up by their genuine love & interest in UK underground music, "TAЭT VREMYA" art group and the creator of the Moscow parties "Judder".

Kishan is a DJ and Producer currently based in London. Actively involved in the music scene already, he produces and mixes a wide range of genres including UK Garage, Drum & Bass, House, Disco and Afrobeat.

subtle.n: Out of Phase With Sam Ling

subtle.d: Sessions w/ Amy B is an underground multi-genre music show, showcasing the most prolific guests from all corners of the music industry.

Originally linking up in Wellington and playing shows with the Breaking Beats crew, Swampman and Zero Crumbs have reunited – bringing their smooth mixing and flexible selections to East London. 

In their monthly show, the pair explore the deep, dark, and soulful ends of DNB. Expect fresh underground tunes, deep cut classics, and a bit of banter in Kiwi accents.

subtle.n: Dun Roamin w/ Tomi From Brockley

subtle.d:
Midlands born, London based producer and DJ influenced by UK funky, broken techno, garage and early dubstep. 

Has released on Keysound recordings, RKS, eatmybeat, ec2a, Durkle Disco and Dimsum records
Hailing from Belfast but making moves in Nottingham, Nikki O is a DJ and radio presenter whose sets blend 4/4 rhythms, breakbeats, and the bassier side of techno.

dublab.n: Echo Park Film Center - Optical Track
Jennifer Herrema and Kurt Midness - The Banana Question

dublab.d: “Dying Songs focuses on melancholic electronic music but isn’t limited to that. Sometimes it gets dark, sometimes I try to mix techno awkwardly, sometimes i get nostalgic… I like stuff that’s dreamy, ghostly, pretty and sad. I’ll try out new productions of my own, as well. I’m keeping it pretty open and we’ll see how it evolves.” – Jimmy

dublab.n: George Jensen and Heavy Hymns - Quietudes
Daddy Differently and Dirty Dave - Things of Life
dublab.d: It’s the simple things isn’t it? The little things of life. Good food, sunshine, no traffic, dark coffee, 72˚ breeze, telephone off the hook and music every Friday morning a la Daddy Differently & Dirty Dave.
Peak Oil records presents ‘tipping point’; a monthly journey through the record collections of brian and brion. Leaving no good genre unturned, enjoy two hours of esoterica, conversation and guests.

dublab.n: Ill Camille x Jesse Fairfax - The Sweeter the Juice
Greg Belson - Divine Chord Gospel Show
